meaning: n.(尤指沿山崖筑出视界开阔的)滨海路(亦作corniche road)
examples: Arabs at the Corniche with Sheraton Hotel behind.
For a comfortable rest during one's travels, Saraya Corniche offers ideal accommodations.
Our first project is building a pedestrian tunnel under the Maadi Corniche el Nile where Deana died.
The city is centred on the Corniche, a wide, curving avenue that runs along the bay.
The vertigo-inducing route into the mountains above Malibu felt like the Grande Corniche of Southern California.
